description:
Re-opened from 340 plan after e2e validation. Path-342/343/344 modules and APIs exist but are not reachable in the primary /writer -> /session journey.

Required outcomes:
- Add onboarding gate with resume presence check and resume upload action
- Wire LinkedIn input modes into primary entry sequence
- Expose acceleration and LinkedIn planning stages in reachable UX flow
- Add integration/e2e coverage for user path, not isolated module tests
title: Re-open Track C scope: onboarding + acceleration/linkedin modules into primary flow

description:
Net-new function scope captured in specs/voice-assisted-session-ui-ux.md (E2E Corrections 2026-03-03).

Required outcomes:
- Assistant opens recall with proactive hello/context question
- Conversational interviewing prompt techniques implemented
- Recording page shows co-editable working answer panel
- Persist turn-level conversation to DB for resume/reconnect
- Add observability events for greeting/edit/persist/recovery
title: New scope: proactive recall greeting, coaching prompt strategy, co-edit panel, and turn persistence

description:
emitNewPathClientEvent posts interstitial_shown and related events to /api/telemetry/new-path-events, but no matching app route exists in frontend/src/app/api.

In production testing (branch context: new-path-events), telemetry request returns 405 Method Not Allowed for payload {event_name:'interstitial_shown', payload:{...}}.

Code evidence:
- frontend/src/lib/newPathTelemetryClient.ts line 9 sets DEFAULT_ENDPOINT='/api/telemetry/new-path-events'.
- frontend/src/modules/session/interstitial/InterstitialController.tsx emits interstitial_shown.
- No route file exists at frontend/src/app/api/telemetry/new-path-events/route.ts.

Expected:
- Add POST route /api/telemetry/new-path-events that validates event_name+payload via validateNewPathEvent/newPathEventLogger and returns 2xx non-blocking, OR
- Update client endpoint to an existing compatible route and contract.
title: Fix 405 on interstitial new-path telemetry endpoint

description:
e2e gap: after stopping recording, anchors/actions/outcomes remain at zero and are not explained; user lacks stop-state controls and cannot reliably issue move-on intents.

Required outcomes:
- Wire live persisted progress into recall UI (remove static zero fallback)
- Add helper copy for anchors/actions/outcomes semantics
- On stop: show re-record, start-over, continue/next-question controls
- Present incomplete prompts/slots in actionable language
- Handle user intents: next question / move on / skip with incomplete-slot guardrails
- Emit telemetry for stop action, move-on intent, and incomplete-slot presentation
title: Recall slot clarity and stop-state controls

description:
Re-opened from 340 plan after e2e validation. Implement missing user-facing URL capture in /writer entry and wire it through path-340 ingestion into session initialization.

Required outcomes:
- Add first-step URL input UI in /writer
- Enforce URL-driven context initialization before ORIENT
- Preserve channel ingestion parity (paste/email/sms)
- Update tests from route-only to include primary workflow integration
title: Re-open Track A scope: /writer URL entry + ingestion initialization wiring

description:
Live e2e validation found that closure of 340-345 was premature. API/tests landed, but primary /writer journey is missing required wiring to onboarding/ingestion and acceleration surfaces.

Evidence:
- /writer starts session directly without URL capture or resume gate
- onboarding/acceleration/linkedin planning modules are not reachable from primary workflow
- recall UX does not yet meet greeting + co-edit + turn persistence expectations

This issue tracks the re-opened scope from thoughts/searchable/shared/plans/2026-03-03--07-51--tdd-voice-assisted-session-ui-ux-orchestration-340-345.md and specs/voice-assisted-session-ui-ux.md (E2E Corrections section).
title: Re-open 340-345 UX implementation after e2e validation
